message: Major CMS Update & Error Resilience System
changelog: Fixed critical PDOException where an active user session crashes if the Hostinger `users` database is deleted or missing.
Fixed fatal crash when accessing the site root before DB initialisation by gracefully catching missing tables and intelligently redirecting to the installer.
Implemented catastrophic rollback engine to auto-repair the CMS if an update ever fails mid-installation.
Fixed critical Updater bug where files copied on Hostinger caused a 404 error due to missing CHMOD 0644 read permissions.
Strict fallback validation for Theme Settings Tabs.
Fixed Theme Settings navigation tabs stacking issue.
Added robust One-Click Update Wizard directly in the Admin Panel.
Overhauled the Theme Settings user interface to look elegant and responsive.
Fixed critical permission errors relating to missing database columns.
Resolved bugs with the install.php and run_migration.php scripts.
Implemented database safety logic to prevent dashboard crashes during upgrades.
